description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust wooden full stock and fore-end, paired with a metallic barrel and receiver. The barrel is relatively short, typical of tactical or home-defense shotguns, and is finished in a matte gray metal. The fore-end is ribbed, indicating a pump-action mechanism, and the trigger is protected by a rounded metal guard. The receiver is compact and metallic, seamlessly connecting the stock and barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or advanced sighting systems, making it suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a wooden full stock and fore-end, matte gray metal barrel, and a rounded trigger guard. The design is simple and functional, ideal for urban scenarios.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, ribbed pump fore-end, and the entire length of the metallic barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the fore-end and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and barrel details, with the trigger and guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metal guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
